title: boschniakia glabra
intro: Boschniakia glabra, also known as the toothache plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Boschniakia glabra include its ability to relieve toothache pain, reduce fever, and treat respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
